content.full_text:
June 3, 1976

Ms. Erna Becker  
c/o Coast Mortgage and Realty Investors  
315 West Ninth Street  
Los Angeles, California 90015

Dear Ms. Becker:

This letter is to confirm my advice to you by telephone on June 1, 1976.

Corporations are not prohibited by state law from contributing to state and local candidates and ballot measures.

Sincerely,

NAN HAMBLETON  
Special Compliance Representative

NH: mak

bcc: Jeanne-A
